button.primary_class: bg-cyan-600 hover:bg-cyan-500 text-white font-mono uppercase tracking-wider rounded-sm
button.danger_class: bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-500 text-white font-mono uppercase tracking-wider rounded-sm
button.outline_class: border border-slate-700 hover:border-cyan-500 text-slate-300 hover:text-cyan-400 bg-transparent font-mono uppercase rounded-sm

input.base_class: bg-slate-900/50 border border-slate-700 focus:border-cyan-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-cyan-500 text-slate-200 rounded-sm placeholder:text-slate-600

interaction_guidelines.loading_state: Use inline loading indicators for async actions.
interaction_guidelines.empty_state: Show clear empty-state messages with next-step hints.
interaction_guidelines.error_state: Display API errors in panel-level alerts and preserve context.
interaction_guidelines.transitions: Use targeted transitions (color, shadow, transform); avoid transition-all.

qa_checklist: Interactive elements include data-testid where integration tests rely on them
Status badges use consistent clean/suspicious/quarantine tokens
All pages implement loading, empty, and error states
